title: Warfare+
description: Modpack inspired by Vanilla+ Modpacks with client optimizations, automatizations focused on Create and World Exploration on 1.20.1
body:
Warfare+ is inspired by many Vanilla+ Modpacks. We created this modpack with more robust optimizations, updated mods and Quality of Life tweaks and changes designed to improve player experience and game performance.
Modpack is intended for Singleplayer and Multiplayer use.
